## Source

Link or describe the source and why it is safe to use.

## License / public-domain status

Explain the copyright status.

## What does it test?

- [ ] Page numbers
- [ ] Running headers/footers
- [ ] Chapter headings
- [ ] Footnotes
- [ ] OCR noise
- [ ] Intraword spaces
- [ ] Glued words
- [ ] Other

## Minimal sample

Use the smallest possible sample needed for the test.
